name: Gold Medal Caramel Bars
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 oz Reduced fat chocolate cake mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Prepare a 9 x 13" pan with cooking spray; set aside.
In a mixing bowl, combine cake mix and condensed milk. The batter will be thick.
Press two-thirds of the batter into the prepared pan.
Bake for 8 minutes. Remove from the oven.
Pour caramel topping over the cake.
Sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
Crumble remaining batter over the top.
Bake for an additional 17 minutes, or until the top is dry to the touch. Cool.
